quote: Love one another. As I have loved you, so you must love one another.
author: Jesus, John 13:34

quote: I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness, but will have the light of life.
author: Jesus, John 8:12

quote: Do not let your hearts be troubled. You believe in God; believe also in me.
author: Jesus, John 14:1

quote: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
author: Jesus, Matthew 5:9

quote: Ask and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock and the door will be opened for you.
author: Jesus, Matthew 7:7

quote: Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast, it is not proud.
author: Paul, 1 Corinthians 13:4

quote: Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
author: Paul, Romans 12:21

quote: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
author: Paul, Philippians 4:13

quote: And now these three remain: faith, hope and love. But the greatest of these is love.
author: Paul, 1 Corinthians 13:13

quote: Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.
author: Paul, Philippians 4:6

quote: There is no fear in love. But perfect love drives out fear.
author: John, 1 John 4:18

quote: Dear children, let us not love with words or speech but with actions and in truth.
author: John, 1 John 3:18

quote: Above all, love each other deeply, because love covers over a multitude of sins.
author: Peter, 1 Peter 4:8

quote: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
author: Peter, 1 Peter 5:7

quote: Come near to God and he will come near to you.
author: James, James 4:8

quote: Every good and perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of the heavenly lights.
author: James, James 1:17
